prompt: Cinematic wide-angle editorial photograph of a professional photography studio. A photographer in a dark linen apron leans in to adjust a gold jewelry pendant on a small acrylic riser. Studio strobe lights visible in background, softbox casting directional light. Neutral cream cyclorama sweep backdrop. Shallow depth of field, foreground props include a tethered laptop showing a product image. Warm charcoal and cream tones. No text. Photorealistic, high detail.

Overhead flat-lay photograph on cream linen. A perfectly arranged 4x3 grid of 12 diverse artisan products: small jewelry pieces, incense boxes, leather pouches, brass diyas. Each item placed with even spacing. Soft diffused natural light from top. Warm cream background, no shadows. Editorial, clean, no text.

Product mockup photograph. Nine smartphones fanned out in a wide arc on a charcoal surface, each screen showing a different ecommerce marketplace homepage (abstract, no real logos — just colorful storefront UI). Phones angled at 45 degrees. Depth of field blurs outer phones. No text. Studio lit, top-down slightly angled perspective.

Close-up flat-lay on warm cream surface. A large mechanical desk timer reading 48:00 placed next to a small gold jewelry piece — a pendant necklace coiled beside it. Soft side lighting casts gentle shadow. Minimal composition. No text. Film-inspired warm tones.

Ultra-subtle cream textured background. Handmade paper or fine cotton canvas texture, photographed flat. Very light warm ivory tone, barely perceptible fiber detail. No logos, no text, no objects. Even lighting, no shadows or vignette.

Abstract graphic image. Faint topographic-style outlines of recognizable country silhouettes — India, USA, UK, UAE, Australia — rendered as very subtle hairline engravings on a deep charcoal background. Outlines are extremely light, almost invisible, like embossing. No labels, no text, no color fills. Minimal and elegant.

Editorial product photography scene. A pair of gloved hands — cream cotton gloves — carefully placing a delicate gold pendant on a clear acrylic riser on a cream sweep backdrop. Camera angle is eye-level, close-up on the hands and product. Bokeh background reveals softbox lights. Studio professional feel. Warm whites, soft gold tones. No text.

Screen mockup of a Seller Hub dashboard UI on a laptop screen. The dashboard shows abstract analytics — bar charts, a donut chart, listing health score. Dark UI with gold accent colors. Product thumbnail cards visible. The laptop sits on a clean desk with soft ambient light. No real platform branding. No text except abstract data labels.

Flat-lay product photography. Five distinct framed mockups of the same gold jewelry piece — a pendant — each framed to match different ecommerce marketplace image specifications: white background square, lifestyle crop, infographic overlay, 360 spin frame, zoom-in macro. Frames arranged in a clean grid on cream surface with thin gold borders. Editorial, clean. No logos. No text.

Minimal icon-style illustration on cream background. A large magnifying glass centered over an upward-trending sparkline graph. Gold and charcoal tones. Clean vector-like rendering but with subtle paper texture. No text. Single focal element.

Minimal icon-style illustration on cream background. A dieline box template frame with a large gold checkmark overlaid at center. Charcoal hairline borders. Subtle shadow depth. No text. Clean, professional.

Minimal icon-style illustration on cream background. A stopwatch or countdown timer centered, clock face reading 48:00. Gold minute hand, charcoal body. Clean, bold. No text. Paper texture background.

Minimal illustration on cream background. A single ribbon or thread weaving through five circular medallions arranged in a horizontal line. Each medallion represents a service (abstract icons: camera, palette, chart, box, megaphone). Gold ribbon, charcoal medallions. No text.
Minimal illustration on cream background. A 3x3 dot grid, all dots charcoal except the center dot which is gold and slightly larger. Perfectly centered composition. No text. Clean geometric.

Minimal illustration on cream background. A signed proposal cover — a document folder with a signature line at bottom and a gold checkmark stamp at top right. Charcoal and cream tones. No readable text. Clean editorial.

Professional product photography. Diamond stud earrings placed on rich black velvet fabric, centered. Studio lighting with one directional soft light creating gentle sparkle. Extreme close-up, macro feel. Black background with very subtle texture. No text. Photorealistic.

Professional product photography. A delicate gold chain necklace coiled loosely on cream linen fabric. Diffused natural window light from the left. Shallow depth of field. Warm ivory tones. Minimal composition. No text.

Professional product and packaging photography. Premium incense sticks in elegant matte packaging box, placed on a cedar wood surface. Side lighting casts a warm golden shadow. Earthy tones — cedar brown, matte black box with gold foil text (abstract, not readable). Lifestyle editorial feel. No text.

Product lifestyle photography. A rudraksha bead bracelet coiled next to a small brass oil diya lamp. Placed on a stone or marble surface. Warm candlelight glow from the diya. Earthy, spiritual, premium. Close-up composition. No text. Photorealistic.

Product photography. An aquamarine gemstone bracelet draped across a textured charcoal slate surface. Studio lit with a cool highlight catching the stones. Minimal composition, generous negative space. No text.

Product photography. A slim leather bifold wallet placed on hammered concrete surface. Dark charcoal wallet, concrete texture background. Dramatic top-down side lighting. Masculine, premium. Close crop. No text.
Product lifestyle photography. Handcrafted ceramic mug on a worn oak table, steam rising. Warm morning light, linen napkin beside it. Artisan ecommerce aesthetic. No text.
Product photography. A copper ring dish with a delicate gold ring resting inside it, on a cream terrazzo surface. Overhead angle. Soft diffused light. Minimal, editorial. No text.

Lifestyle editorial photograph. Two people sit across a desk reviewing printed papers — a listing audit report with highlighted text visible (abstract, not readable). One person points to a chart. Clean home office or co-working space setting. Warm ambient light. Neutral cream and wood tones. Authentic feel, not stock-photo staged. No text visible. Photorealistic.

Group portrait photograph. Five young creative professionals standing in a relaxed arrangement inside a photography studio — some smiling, some serious. Diverse: mix of South Asian, East Asian, Western individuals. Casual professional dress — dark linen, cream shirts. Softbox lighting, neutral backdrop. Authentic team energy. No text.

Lifestyle close-up photograph. Two pairs of hands over a printed listing audit report on a desk — one hand points to a highlighted section, the other holds a pen making notes. Collaborative, focused. Warm desk light. No readable text on paper.

Graphic image. Deep charcoal banner with three large stat blocks centered horizontally: 500+ then 9 then 4.9 star. Each number in large white sans-serif, sub-label in smaller cream text below. Clean grid layout. Gold hairline dividers between blocks. No other elements.

Flat-lay photograph on cream surface. A thick cream notepad with three handwritten lines visible (abstract, not readable) — like a short form being filled out. A smartphone beside it, screen showing abstract UI. A pen resting diagonally across the notepad. Warm side light. Actionable, welcoming. No readable text.

Open Graph share card design. Dark charcoal background. Centered large white sans-serif headline: A studio built by people who actually sell. Below it, smaller cream subtext: Saleixo — Product Photography, Design, Ecommerce. Top-left: abstract small logo mark. Clean, bold, minimal. No gradients. Professional brand card.
Clean background plate. Cream surface with a single fine gold hairline border framing the plate edge. For overlaying partner logos. Even lighting, no texture, no shadows. Flat and neutral.

Clean background plate. Pure white surface with a single thin charcoal hairline border at top and bottom edges. For overlaying payment method icons. Perfectly flat, even light, no texture or gradient.

Editorial illustration. An empty photography studio — cream cyclorama sweep floor, no subject on set. A single paper luggage tag hanging from the ceiling on a thin string, with NOTHING ON SET YET written on it in handwritten style. Warm studio ambient light, softboxes off. Lonely but charming atmosphere.

Graphic banner. Charcoal dark background, centered large white headline text Amazon Tips and Strategies in clean sans-serif. Subtle gold underline accent below headline. No other elements. Clean editorial.

Graphic banner. Charcoal dark background, centered large white headline text Shopify Growth Guides in clean sans-serif. Subtle gold underline accent below headline. No other elements. Clean editorial.
Graphic banner. Charcoal dark background, centered large white headline text Ecommerce Marketing in clean sans-serif. Subtle gold underline accent below headline. No other elements. Clean editorial.

Graphic banner. Charcoal dark background, centered large white headline text Agency Insights in clean sans-serif. Subtle gold underline accent below headline. No other elements. Clean editorial.

UI mockup photograph. Lifestyle photograph. A laptop screen showing a product listing page with poor performance indicators — low review count, bad images visible as grey thumbnails, red annotation arrows drawn on the screen overlay (abstract handdrawn style). Lifestyle photograph. A small artisan storefront window — handmade goods visible inside, a paper sign on the window reading Shop Online Now in handwritten style, partially visible. Warm interior light. Brick exterior. No brand names.

Interior photography. A white studio wall with 12 framed product shots mounted in a 3x4 grid — each frame showing a different artisan product: jewelry, ceramics, textiles, leather. Clean gallery feel. White walls, natural light. No text.

Minimal illustration. A large magnifying glass hovering over a clipboard with a printed listing audit checklist — some items ticked, some flagged. Cream background, charcoal and gold tones. No readable text. Clean editorial.

Editorial photography. Wide shot inside a professional photo studio. A stylist leans over a product table, using fine tweezers to adjust a jewelry piece on a cream surface. Background shows softboxes, reflectors, tethered laptop. Two crew members in background. Authentic, professional. No text.

Technical diagram photograph.
